remarks: Welcome to 1049 Stillwater Road, a refined and thoughtfully built residence nestled in Stamford's highly sought-after Westover neighborhood. Built in 2019, this exceptional home blends contemporary design with timeless comfort, offering the quality, style, and peace of mind of newer construction.  Featuring five bedrooms and four-and-a-half bathrooms, the home is designed for both comfortable everyday living and effortless entertaining. A private in-law or guest suite-with its own sleeping area and full bathroom-provides flexible accommodations for extended family or visitors. Additional highlights include a dedicated home office, a well-appointed home gym, and abundant storage throughout.  Surrounded by mature landscaping, the property offers exceptional privacy and a tranquil setting for relaxing or entertaining outdoors.  Ideally located just minutes from the Merritt Parkway, this home combines everyday convenience with the charm and prestige of one of Stamford's most desirable residential neighborhoods.  This is a rare opportunity to lease a move-in-ready spacious home where thoughtful design, exceptional comfort, and an outstanding location come together beautifully.
